//: CSS baseline: an in-memory, unauthenticated Community Solid Server (npx @solid/community-server). CSS is NOT a JLWS implementation — this config declares no optional features, no capabilities, no agent seams, so the run scores exactly what an existing Solid/LDP server does against the clean-slate spec. Override the target port with --target.
label: Community Solid Server (in-memory, unauthenticated) — CSS baseline
